headline: Newmont (NEM) Is Down 10.0% After Authorizing US$6 Billion Buyback And Q1 Beat - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In April 2026, Newmont Corporation reported first‑quarter 2026 results showing higher sales of US$7,307 million and net income of US$3,262 million year over year, affirmed an estimated ordinary dividend of US$0.26 per share, and authorized up to US$6.00 billion in open‑ended share repurchases. Taken together, the stronger quarterly profitability, continued cash returns through dividends, and sizable buyback authorization point to management’s current confidence in Newmont’s balance sheet and...

headline: Newmont Investors Should Have Expected It
summary: Newmont Mining shareholders have been on a rollercoaster ride over the past year, and it isn't over yet.
